title: 有馬記念の後に・終わらない栄華

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright wins the Arima Kinen as a shining
new light for the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may have walked that unending path slowly...
but she has arrived at the summit nonetheless.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She tells the crowd about what is unique to the
Mejiros, what they have protected until now, and
their story that is now unfolding into a new age.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright, dazzling like a star, becomes
worthy of admiration not only as a Mejiro but as
an Umamusume.
